mood: Formal, Official, Trustworthy, Secure, Dense but clear

hierarchy.h1: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight text-gray-900

components_strategy.buttons: Solid backgrounds for primary actions with hover:bg-primary-light. Rounded-md, font-medium, focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary/50.
components_strategy.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px solid border (border-gray-200), no heavy shadow. Minimalist and structured.
components_strategy.tables: Dense rows, left-aligned columns, alternating row backgrounds (optional) for readability, clear status badges (e.g., Active/Archived).
components_strategy.modals: Backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-sm bg-black/40), solid white dialog, strict padding (p-6).
components_strategy.badges: Subtle background with bold text. e.g., bg-green-100 text-green-800 for Active, bg-red-100 text-red-800 for Archived.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle background shifts, transform scale (e.g., scale-105 for icons), explicitly set hover text color.
motion_and_interactions.focus: High contrast focus rings (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2).

logo.description: Armoiries officielles République du Congo, to be used as favicon and header logo.

hero_login.description: Drapeau du Congo + logo Ministère des Hydrocarbures, fond vert institutionnel, to be used as login page hero background image.

specific_instructions_to_main_agent: Build a Professional GED (MHCGED) with a sidebar layout and top header.
Login page MUST use the 'hero_login' image as a side panel or background with a max overlay opacity of bg-black/50, and display the 'logo' above the login form.
The application language MUST be French.
Use deep institutional green (#0F4C3A) as the primary brand color for active states, CTAs, and sidebar highlights.
Implement role-based access control UI (Admin vs Agent).
Dashboard should display key metrics: Total Documents, Active Folders, Total Agents, Archived Documents.
Use data-testid attributes on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Do NOT use 'Inter' font. Use 'Work Sans' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions like Modals (Dialog), Dropdowns, Tables, and Forms.
